speaker: speaker1
text: Could I have my bill , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm afraid there's been a mistake .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry , sir . What seems to be the trouble ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I believe you have charged me twice for the same thing . Look , the figure of 6.5 dollar appears here , then again here .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'll just go and check it for you , sir .
